sections.paragraph:
i.q. זָכָה (which see), to be pure, used of things physically [?], Lam 4:7 used morally, Job 15:15 25:5 . Comp. the kindred root זָגַג [“also צָחַח”].

Hiphil, to cleanse, to wash, Job 9:30.

[“Niphal, see זָכָה Hithpael.”]

Derivatives, זָךְ and זַךְ, זְכוּכִית and pr.n. זַכַּי.
